PowerShell($c = Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 4173 -State Listen -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; if \($c\) { $c.OwningProcess | Sort-Object -Unique | ForEach-Object { Write-Output "killing PID $_"; Stop-Process -Id $_ -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue } } else { Write-Output "nothing on 4173" })

PowerShell($c = Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 4173 -State Listen -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; if \($c\) { $c.OwningProcess | Sort-Object -Unique | ForEach-Object { Stop-Process -Id $_ -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue } }; Write-Output "stopped")

PowerShell($c = Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 4173 -State Listen -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; if \($c\) { Write-Output "HTTPS server is running on 4173 \(PID $\($c.OwningProcess -join ','\)\)" } else { Write-Output "NOT running - needs restart" })

PowerShell($ts = "C:\\Program Files\\Tailscale\\tailscale.exe"; if \(-not \(Test-Path $ts\)\) { $ts = \(Get-Command tailscale.exe -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue\).Source }; if \(-not $ts\) { Write-Output "tailscale.exe not found on PATH/default location" } else { Write-Output "CLI: $ts"; & $ts status 2>&1 | Select-Object -First 4; Write-Output "--- DNS name ---"; & $ts status --json 2>&1 | ConvertFrom-Json | ForEach-Object { $_.Self.DNSName } })

PowerShell($c = Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 4173 -State Listen -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; if \($c\) { $c.OwningProcess | Sort-Object -Unique | ForEach-Object { Stop-Process -Id $_ -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue }; Write-Output "stopped https server on 4173" } else { Write-Output "4173 free" })

PowerShell($ts = "C:\\Program Files\\Tailscale\\tailscale.exe"; & $ts status 2>&1 | Select-Object -First 2; Write-Output "--- self ---"; \(& $ts status --json 2>&1 | ConvertFrom-Json\).Self | Select-Object DNSName, @{n='IP';e={$_.TailscaleIPs -join ','}}, Online | Format-List)
PowerShell($ts = "C:\\Program Files\\Tailscale\\tailscale.exe"; & $ts serve --bg --https=443 http://localhost:4173 2>&1; Write-Output "--- serve status ---"; & $ts serve status 2>&1)

PowerShell($ok=$false; for\($i=0;$i -lt 30;$i++\){ try { $r=Invoke-WebRequest -Uri http://localhost:5173 -UseBasicParsing -TimeoutSec 2; if\($r.StatusCode -eq 200\){ $ok=$true; break } } catch {}; Start-Sleep -Milliseconds 800 }; "client up: $ok"; try { \(Invoke-WebRequest -Uri http://localhost:3001/api/books -UseBasicParsing -TimeoutSec 3\).StatusCode } catch { "server: $\($_.Exception.Message\)" })

PowerShell($ok=$false; for\($i=0;$i -lt 25;$i++\){ try { $r=Invoke-WebRequest -Uri http://localhost:3001/api/books -UseBasicParsing -TimeoutSec 3; $ok=$true; "server up: $\($r.StatusCode\), body: $\($r.Content.Substring\(0,[Math]::Min\(200,$r.Content.Length\)\)\)"; break } catch { Start-Sleep -Milliseconds 800 } }; if\(-not $ok\){ "server not up after retries" })

PowerShell($ok=$false; for\($i=0;$i -lt 40;$i++\){ $l=Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 3001 -State Listen -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; if\($l\){ $ok=$true; break }; Start-Sleep -Milliseconds 1000 }; "listening on 3001: $ok")

PowerShell($s=$false;$c=$false; for\($i=0;$i -lt 30;$i++\){ if\(-not $s\){$s=[bool]\(Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 3001 -State Listen -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue\)}; if\(-not $c\){$c=[bool]\(Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 5173 -State Listen -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue\)}; if\($s -and $c\){break}; Start-Sleep -Milliseconds 1000 }; "server\(3001\): $s  client\(5173\): $c"; if\($s\){ try{ $r=Invoke-WebRequest http://localhost:3001/api/books -UseBasicParsing -TimeoutSec 5; "books: $\($r.StatusCode\) $\($r.Content.Substring\(0,[Math]::Min\(300,$r.Content.Length\)\)\)" }catch{ "books err: $\($_.Exception.Message\)" } })

PowerShell(for\($i=0;$i -lt 20;$i++\){ if\(Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 3001 -State Listen -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue\){break}; Start-Sleep -Milliseconds 800 }; "up: $\([bool]\(Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 3001 -State Listen -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue\)\)"; try { $resp = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri http://localhost:3001/api/extract -Method Post -InFile "C:\\Users\\olive\\Downloads\\test_problems_01.jpg" -ContentType "image/jpeg" -UseBasicParsing -TimeoutSec 130; "status: $\($resp.StatusCode\)"; $resp.Content.Substring\(0,[Math]::Min\(500,$resp.Content.Length\)\) } catch { "HTTP error: $\($_.Exception.Response.StatusCode.value__\) - $\($_.Exception.Message\)" })

PowerShell(Start-Sleep -Seconds 3; try { $r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://127.0.0.1:3001/api/books" -UseBasicParsing -TimeoutSec 3; Write-Output "STATUS $\($r.StatusCode\)"; Write-Output $r.Content } catch { Write-Output "ERR: $\($_.Exception.Message\)"; Get-Content $env:TEMP\\qb-server.log -Tail 20 })

PowerShell($up=$false; for\($i=0;$i -lt 30;$i++\){ try{ $r=Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://127.0.0.1:3001/api/books" -UseBasicParsing -TimeoutSec 2; $up=$true; break }catch{ Start-Sleep -Milliseconds 400 } }; if\($up\){ Write-Output "UP" } else { Write-Output "STILL DOWN"; Get-Content $env:TEMP\\qb-server.log -Tail 12 })
